## Tags
colors, colours, swatches, pantone, shades, tint, hue, saturation, brightness, theme, scheme, palette, samples, textile, carpet

## Categories
design, home, photography

## Source
[Lucide v1.14.0](https://lucide.dev/icons/swatch-book)

## Example
```rust
use dioxus::prelude::*;
use dioxus_icons::lucide::SwatchBook;

fn app() -> Element {
    rsx! {
        SwatchBook { size: 20, color: "red" }
    }
}
```
